title: Psychometry
wikitext:
[[File:Psychometry.jpg|thumb|right|400px|Pam Asbury (Rose Red) begins to read the dark history of a haunted house]]

==Summary==
'''Psychometry''' is the ability to ascertain knowledge via [[Extrasensory Perception|paranormal senses]] about the history of an object or person, usually by direct contact or proximity. It is an extremely useful power in terms of information gathering. Using Psychometry, an individual may be able to pick up on the residual traces of people and objects in a given environment, transfer information to others instantaneously, or determine the course of the past and the future for any given thing.

Users may also be able to pick up memories, emotions or even skills depending on their level of prowess and the exact nature of their power. One common weakness of the power however is the ability to be overwhelmed by especially potent auras and events. Information may also be hidden to users of Psychometry depending on other powers being used.
